product_outcome: Consensus relabel outcomes can now be published as new immutable package versions instead of remaining non-executable proposals.

behavior.parent_immutability: The source package is read-only and every parent manifest/source binding is revalidated before publication.
behavior.pixel_integrity: Source and target binary-mask bytes remain exact while the copied indexed ontology map and manifest label are remapped together.
behavior.authority_boundary: A relabeled version is frozen as a machine_candidate with authority_claimed=false and requires fresh certification; stale parent certification is not inherited.
behavior.lineage: Each version binds parent manifest/lineage/source hashes, plan, batch, result, critic quorum, ontology file, relabel map, and preserved target-mask hashes.
behavior.atomicity: Publication uses a same-filesystem staging directory and atomic rename. Exact replays are idempotent; any existing byte drift or lineage conflict fails closed.
behavior.operator_output: The CLI writes an immutable publication receipt and emits only the compact published count, receipt hash, and recertification requirement.

remaining_acceptance: Promote and certify the primary visual critic plus independent-family juror, execute all seven real 220-package batches, publish the resulting immutable versions and fresh package certificates, and record population-level outcomes.
